title: Eden Oncology – Proudly nominated for Best of George
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Eden Oncology is honoured to...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Eden Oncology is honoured to be nominated for Best of George – reflecting our unfaltering commitment to compassionate, expert cancer care in the Garden Route.

Our specialist team includes three experienced oncologists – Dr Michiel Botha, Dr Lee-Ann Jones and Dr Marianne Kruger – who work hand in hand with a dedicated support team to deliver personalised, evidence-based treatment to every patient. They are supported by Dr Karlien van Dyk, our full-time medical officer and palliative care practitioner, and Dr Louis Botha, who consults part-time to further strengthen continuity of care.

Eden Oncology collaborates with the clinical research organisation TASK to access cutting edge treatment for our patients as part of its clinical trials.

What truly sets Eden Oncology apart is our comprehensive approach. We believe in treating more than just the disease. Our team includes skilled oncology social workers, who play a vital role in supporting patients and their families emotionally and practically throughout their cancer journey.


> From chemotherapy and radiation to patient counselling and ongoing follow-up, we are proud to offer comprehensive, multidisciplinary cancer care in a warm and welcoming environment.


Located in George, with an expanding presence in Mossel Bay, Oudtshoorn and Stilbaai, Eden Oncology is a beacon of hope and healing for patients across the Garden Route.

We are grateful to our patients, families, and referring doctors for their trust - and to our incredible team for their dedication.

Cast your vote here: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/

The Eden Oncology team.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
